etymology.description: Depicts 雨(雨) (yǔ, "rain") with both 小(小) (xiǎo, "small") and 大(大) (dà, "big") drops.
etymology.interpretation: The character 霝(霝) (líng, phonic component) represents rain with a combination of different-sized drops, emphasizing the variety and abundance found in a rainstorm. It is an ancient pictogram related to the natural elements and the depiction of rain.
